news-global-econ.title: Nebraska ends in-state tuition benefits for illegal immigrants under DOJ deal
news-global-econ.description: Under a proposed consent decree with the U.S. Department of Justice, Nebraska agreed to permanently end in-state tuition for illegal immigrants.

news-global-econ.title: Hakeem Jeffries left scrambling after child reporter asks why voters view Democrats so negatively
news-global-econ.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries appeared stunned after a child asked him why voters view Democrats so poorly during a Capitol Hill event.

news-global-econ.title: Panama Canal Experiencing Surge in Traffic Due to Middle East War
news-global-econ.description:
The Administrator of the Panama Canal Authority said Thursday that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East has led to a surge in traffic through the Panama Canal.

news-global-econ.title: U.S. Envoy Arrives to Lead Embassy in Venezuela
news-global-econ.description:
Veteran U.S. diplomat John M. Barrett arrived in Caracas on Thursday to serve as the new head of the American embassy in Venezuela as part of President Donald Trump's three-phase plan towards restoring democracy in the South American country.
The post U.S. En…

news-global-econ.title: Pakistan Maintains Security Lockdown for Possible U.S.-Iran Talks
news-global-econ.description:
Pakistan’s capital of Islamabad has maintained its security lockdown throughout the week in the hopes that U.S. and Iranian negotiators might return to resume the talks that broke down last weekend.
The post Pakistan Maintains Security Lockdown for Possible U…

news-korea-soc.title: Iran and its allies are committing epic financial fraud in America. I watch it happen every day
news-korea-soc.description: State actors from Iran, North Korea, Russia and China run coordinated financial fraud operations inside the U.S. system using stolen identity data.

news-global-soc.title: Your daily coffee habit may be quietly reshaping your gut and mood, study finds
news-global-soc.description: A new study from APC Microbiome Ireland finds that habitual coffee consumption alters gut bacteria, influencing mood, stress and cognitive sharpness.

news-global-soc.title: Trump on Betting Activity Tied to Global Conflicts: 'I’m Not Happy with Any of That Stuff'
news-global-soc.description: President Donald Trump addressed concerns about potential insider trading in global betting markets after being asked about suspected wagering tied to the Iran conflict, following a case involving a U.S. Special Forces soldier accused of using classified info…

news-global-soc.title: US targets China refinery in sweeping Iran oil crackdown, sanctions ‘shadow fleet’ tankers
news-global-soc.description: The OFAC sanctioned a major Chinese oil refinery and dozens of Iran-linked shadow fleet vessels in an escalation of a maximum pressure campaign on Tehran.

news-global-soc.title: Trump DOJ jumps into Musk xAI court battle as diversity fight heats up
news-global-soc.description: The DOJ backs Elon Musk's xAI lawsuit alleging Colorado's AI law forces developers to adopt DEI standards, violating the First and Fourteenth Amendments.
